_comment: Apifox MCP server runtime config. Most settings come from env vars set in trendpower's mcp_servers.json. This file is for reference only.

env_required.APIFOX_ACCESS_TOKEN: Apifox access token (prefix APS-), from 个人设置 → API 访问令牌
env_required.APIFOX_PROJECT_ID: Default Apifox project ID (the last path segment of the project URL)

env_optional.APIFOX_DEFAULT_ENVIRONMENT_ID: Default environment ID for apifox run (-e flag)
